content.text: Best practiceOnly define overloaded operators that make intuitive sense for your class.
Only define overloaded operators that make intuitive sense for your class.

list: operator!= can be implemented as !(operator==)operator> can be implemented as operator< with the order of the parameters flippedoperator>= can be implemented as !(operator<)operator<= can be implemented as !(operator>)
operator> can be implemented as operator< with the order of the parameters flippedoperator>= can be implemented as !(operator<)operator<= can be implemented as !(operator>)
operator>= can be implemented as !(operator<)operator<= can be implemented as !(operator>)
